sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Short title
sections.text:
This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Short title
(2024) Act, 2024.

sections.heading: On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, there Supplementary
sections.text:
On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, there Supplementary
appropriation
may be expended from the Consolidated Fund, such monies not
exceeding in the aggregate forty-one billion, nine hundred and
sixteen million, four hundred thousand, one hundred thirty-three
kwacha indicated in respect of the services of the Republic specified
in the third column of the Schedule, being expenditure in excess of
the monies appropriated for the services of the Republic during the
financial year ending on 31st December, 2024.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K 4.00 each.
